steps.title: Recognize the budget line
steps.content: A graph showing combinations of two stocks Sayen can buy is a linear constraint of the form (price A)$\cdot x$ + (price B)$\cdot y$ = total budget. From the graph, the $x$-intercept is $90$ and the $y$-intercept is $50$.

steps.title: Match intercepts to the equation
steps.content:
Test (B): $10x + 18y = 900$.
• $x$-intercept ($y=0$): $10x=900 \Rightarrow x=90$ ✓
• $y$-intercept ($x=0$): $18y=900 \Rightarrow y=50$ ✓

Both intercepts match. That matches choice B — B is correct.
